reviews.review_description: Throughout my journey I tried to find a scary gorrila horror game because it got shut down and this is literally the map everything is the same accept the little guy in city

reviews.review_title: This game like gtag horror revived
reviews.review_description:
Cool game but this STUPID RE6ALEX IN THE CITY,I CAN'T MOVE BECAUSE OF HIM, TAKE THE COLOSSEUM AWAY FROM HIM.
gtag horror revived is a good game and this can be its replacement, please remove the collision, and I do not know if you have stalker in the game?
